channel.title: Anto Subash - tye
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Create and deploy .Net application in MicroK8s
item.description: In this post we will create a simple abp application and deploy it in the microk8s instance.

item.title: Yarp and Tye
item.description: In this post we will see how to create a reverse proxy with Yarp and integrate Tye for our microservice application
